summary: Verified all 3 reported bug fixes in UnifiedSalesPage (/sales-new): 1) Price scheme selector now visible for walk-in customers, 2) Customer creation from sales page working, 3) Order mode product search working with correct route ordering fix.
passed_tests: BACKEND API: GET /api/products/search-detail?q=vit - Returns 2 products (VITMIN and repack)
BACKEND API: GET /api/price-schemes - Returns 4 schemes (retail, wholesale, special, government)
BACKEND API: POST /api/customers - Customer creation successful
BUG #1 FIX: Quick Mode - Price scheme selector visible when no customer selected
BUG #1 FIX: Price scheme dropdown shows 4 options (retail, wholesale, special, government)
BUG #2 FIX: Customer search shows 'Create as new customer' button for non-existing names
BUG #2 FIX: New customer dialog opens with name, phone, address, price scheme fields
BUG #3 FIX: Order Mode - SmartProductSearch returns results when typing 'vit'
BUG #3 FIX: Order Mode - Search dropdown displays product details (capital, availability, parent for repacks)
BUG #3 FIX: Order Mode - Product selection populates line item and adds new row
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in products.py correctly places /search-detail before /{product_id} to prevent path parameter capture
Price fallback logic in UnifiedSalesPage.js correctly handles missing price schemes: prices[scheme] || prices.retail || 0
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_NewCustomer for customer creation test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs reported by user are now fixed: 1) Price scheme selector visible in top-right of sales page when no customer is selected - defaults to 'retail' and affects product prices shown, 2) Typing non-existing customer name shows 'Create as new customer' option that opens a dialog with name/phone/address/price_scheme fields, 3) Product search in Order mode works - the /search-detail route was moved before /{product_id} in products.py to fix route matching. Note: Products without a 'retail' price will show ₱0.00 in the rate column - this is expected behavior when the product only has wholesale pricing.

bug_1_price_scheme_selector.description: Price scheme selector now visible for walk-in customers
bug_1_price_scheme_selector.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Price Scheme' dropdown with 'Retail' selected in top-right area

bug_2_customer_creation.description: Can create customer from sales page
bug_2_customer_creation.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Create as new customer' button and dialog with all fields

bug_3_order_mode_search.description: Product search works in Order mode
bug_3_order_mode_search.evidence: Screenshot shows search dropdown with 2 VITMIN products when typing 'vit'
